Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO ENVIRONMENTAL CONSERVATION
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ENVIRONMENTAL CONSERVATION

Title: Permits structures to remain within a certain erosion hazard area or tidal wetland adjacent area
Summary: Permits structures to remain where the local permitting authority has issued a permit for construction built within a certain erosion hazard area or tidal wetland adjacent area.
ActClause: AN ACT to permit structures to remain within a certain erosion hazard area or tidal wetland adjacent area
